scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.manage
scopes.description: Create, edit, delete bridges and restrictions

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.inspect
scopes.description: Record inspection findings and condition ratings

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.view
scopes.description: Read-only access to bridges and restrictions

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.executive_view
scopes.description: Executive KPI summary — header only, no editable tabs

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.external_view
scopes.description: External/public card view — curated read-only fields, unauthenticated route

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.certify
scopes.description: Approve or reject load rating certificates and permits

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.config_manager
scopes.description: Enable or disable feature flags and system configuration

role-templates.name: BMS_ADMIN
role-templates.description: Full system access including administration and configuration

role-templates.name: BMS_BRIDGE_MANAGER
role-templates.description: Create, edit and manage bridges, load restrictions, and permit approvals

role-templates.name: BMS_OPERATOR
role-templates.description: Manage load restrictions and record condition ratings for assigned state (NSW)

role-templates.name: BMS_INSPECTOR
role-templates.description: Record bridge condition ratings and inspection findings

role-templates.name: BMS_VIEWER
role-templates.description: Read-only access — view bridges, restrictions, maps and reports

role-templates.name: BMS_EXECUTIVE_VIEWER
role-templates.description: Senior leadership — sees header KPIs and bridge status summary, no editable sections

role-templates.name: BMS_EXTERNAL_VIEWER
role-templates.description: External stakeholders (councils, carriers) — public card view with restrictions and permit status only

role-templates.name: BMS_CONFIG_MANAGER
role-templates.description: Enable and disable feature flags without a code deployment

role-collections.name: BMS Executive Viewer
role-collections.description: Executive-level KPI visibility — condition scores, risk level, open defects, cost YTD

role-collections.name: BMS External Viewer
role-collections.description: External public card access — active restrictions and permit status only

role-collections.name: BMS Config Manager
role-collections.description: Feature flag management without code deployment
